items.name_en: CHANE* 24b Double C logo mini flap, made of polished calfskin quilted, soft, delicate, and elastic. Large Double C logo paired with vintage sand gold hardware, full of personality, a perfect blend of retro and fashion, super eye-catching, looks stylish with any outfit! Simple yet not simple design, looks stunning on. From leather selection to stitching, every detail is carefully crafted, offering high durability and practicality. Whether appearance or inner quality, it withstands the test of time. This Chanel calfskin mini flap is definitely a fashion lover's choice. Made of precious black gold calfskin, delicate and soft, exuding noble temperament, highlighting feminine softness while remaining elegant. Classic large Double C logo makes this bag even more brilliant. Can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, fits a phone and daily essentials, high usage rate, making you look elegant and intellectual. A must-have bag!

items.name_en: Chane🌱New Large Chain Cosmetic Bag with Mirror Inside
items.name_cn:
Chane🌱New Large Chain Cosmetic Bag with Mirror Inside
This new box bag actually has a handle! I'm totally in love with the real thing 😌 It has a completely different vibe. Surprise + Amazement! Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld! Fits daily essentials like lipstick 💄, compact powder, keys, etc. The highlight is that it can also hold a large phone 📱 💅
Size: 9.5× 17 ×8cm
No.: 66021
With packaging

items.name_cn:
Chane1 ❄️ Letter Weave Flap Bag | Luxurious and High-End AS4808
The gorgeous metal woven handle, dotted with shimmering rhinestones, is simply beautiful. The petite body exudes an exquisite yet luxurious charm. The classic black reveals a premium texture. It perfectly matches various outfits with a casual carry. Every bag is a carefully crafted work of art. I love this simple yet sophisticated beauty~ The perfect size is versatile and practical.
Size: 13×19×5.5cm
